title: Lebanon president: Israel deal first step to restoring sovereignty

snapshot.title: Lebanon president: Israel deal first step to restoring sovereignty
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said a deal signed with Israel on Friday was a first step toward fully restoring his country’s sovereignty after the latest war between Israel and the Iran-backed Hezbollah. “The framework agreement signed today is a first step” that will enable Lebanese “to return to their fully liberated lands, and to their certainly rebuilt homes...
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Lebanon president: Israel deal first step to restoring sovereignty | Arab News
